title: Polished article frontmatter
description: Frontmatter contract for files under `polished/<platform>/<slug>.polished.md`. Layer A files (`<slug>.layer-a.md`) follow the same shape with `layer: a`.

feature.description: Routing tag — matches a feature bucket the agent can ask about.

archetype.description: Article archetype tag (integration / feature / identity), carried through from pipeline config.

sdk_min_version.description: Semver pin: the SDK release every snippet in the file was validated against.

sdk_artifact.description: Maven / Cocoapods / npm artifact name. Android: `iterableapi` or `iterableapi-ui`.

summary.description: Agent-facing 2–3 sentence summary, extracted from the first prose paragraph(s) by `pnpm enrich:summary`. Required.

source_url.description: Public-facing URL where humans can read the same content.

source_repo.description: GitHub owner/repo of the upstream docs source.

source_ref.description: Pinned commit SHA on the upstream docs repo.

source_sha.description: Git blob SHA of the source file at `source_ref`.

android_excerpt.description: Optional. Marks a doc sourced from a cross-platform article that still contains foreign-platform (iOS/web) examples. Informational in v1 (the deterministic transform does not strip foreign code).

snippets.description: Per-fence manifest. Each entry corresponds to a surviving code block in the body, in document order.

index.description: Position in document order. Must start at 0 and be contiguous.

hash.description: 12-char hex content hash of the code block, used to detect manifest/body drift.
